reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención en la estación de servicio.  Las habitaciones muy cómodas, limpias, bien equipadas. ¡ y con desayuno!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the gas station. The rooms were very comfortable, clean, and well-equipped. And breakfast was included!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJXzZ1VWdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todas iguales te atienden bien en el despacho de combustibles y te asaltan en la confitería

(Translated by Google)
They're all the same; they treat you well at the gas station and rob you at the candy store.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJMzd6OXFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La estación de combustible es muy buena, sin embargo en el autoservicio, por dos aguas saborizadas de medio litro más dos chicles beldent me cobraron 180 pesos.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is very good, however at the self-service, they charged me 180 pesos for two half-liter flavored waters plus two Beldent chewing gums.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbTVqZXRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bien la estación de servicio, aceptan todos los medios de pago y el mini mercado tiene bastante comida.
El baño es super limpio y excelente.
Lo recomiendo, los playeros te atienden perfecto, al caudal de autos, reaccionan con eficiencia.
Recomendado para parar en ruta y tomar un descanzo.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is good; they accept all forms of payment, and the mini-market has plenty of food.
The bathroom is super clean and excellent.
I recommend it. The beach attendants are excellent, and they respond efficiently to the flow of cars.
Recommended for a stop along the way and a break.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJNjQyLThRRRAB
